title: mark_notes_spent has no test coverage
description: mark_notes_spent() is a new public WalletStore method with transaction semantics (all-or-nothing) that differs from the per-note mark_note_spent(). No test exercises it directly: batch success, rollback on missing note_id, or empty-slice no-op. The happy-path coverage in payment tests exercises it indirectly via send_payment but does not isolate or validate the atomicity guarantee. A contributor changing the loop logic or error handling has no failing test to catch the regression.
close_reason: Fixed: added 3 tests — mark_notes_spent_batch_success (both notes marked), mark_notes_spent_empty_slice_is_noop (no-op, Ok), mark_notes_spent_rolls_back_on_missing_note (real note stays unspent after rollback). All pass.
